documents.title: Portal de integração OLX
documents.summary: This document serves as the central landing page for the OLX integration portal, directing developers to resources for ads, chat, leads, highlights, webhooks, and API rate-limiting policies.

documents.title: Perguntas Frequentes
documents.summary: This document provides a directory of links to frequently asked questions and technical support contact information for developers integrating with the OLX platform.

documents.title: Documentação para a Importação de Anúncios da OLX
documents.summary: This document outlines the available methods for third-party ad integration on OLX, detailing supported categories and technical models for API, XML, and JSON imports.

documents.title: Documentação da API de Integração de Anúncios da OLX
documents.summary: This document provides an overview of the OLX Ad Integration API, detailing its available features for managing ads, authentication, status monitoring, and catalog information.

documents.title: Importação de Anúncios via Arquivo JSON
documents.summary: This document outlines the technical requirements and procedures for importing advertisements to OLX using a JSON file, including parameter definitions and synchronization logic for insertions and updates.

documents.title: Autenticação na API olx.com.br
documents.summary: This document provides a comprehensive guide for implementing OAuth 2.0 authentication for web applications integrating with the OLX API.

documents.title: Autenticação do chat na API olx.com.br
documents.summary: This document outlines the authentication and authorization process for OLX chat integration using the OAuth 2.0 protocol. It details the required parameters, scopes, and response handling for obtaining access tokens.

documents.title: Limitação de Taxa (Rate Limit) na API
documents.summary: This document outlines the rate limiting policy for OLX APIs, specifying request thresholds, block durations, and the associated 429 error response.

documents.title: Importação de Anúncios (Inserção/Edição/Deleção)
documents.summary: This document provides technical instructions for programmatically inserting, updating, and deleting advertisements on the OLX platform using their JSON-based API and oAuth authentication.

documents.title: Consulta de status da publicação
documents.summary: This document explains how to monitor and query the status of advertisements published via the OLX API, detailing the differences between import processes and final ad states.

documents.title: Consulta de status da Importação
documents.summary: Explains how to query the publication status of ads after an import process on the OLX platform, detailing request requirements and JSON response structures.

documents.title: Listagem de Publicação
documents.summary: This document describes the OLX Publication Listing API, detailing how to systematically retrieve and manage advertisement data through status filtering and pagination.

documents.title: Consulta do status de Anúncios Publicados
documents.summary: This document provides technical specifications for the OLX API endpoint used to retrieve the current status, publication details, and error messages of a specific advertisement.

documents.title: Inferência de operações
documents.summary: This document explains the logic used by OLX to process advertisement insertions, updates, and deletions based on unique identifiers within XML and JSON integration files.

documents.title: Alteração de categoria
documents.summary: Explains that a listing's category cannot be changed once it has been created and provides guidance on how to correct categorization errors.

documents.title: Especificação de Imagens
documents.summary: This document outlines the technical specifications for images uploaded via integration, including file size limits, supported formats, and required dimensions.

documents.title: Notificação via Webhooks
documents.summary: This document explains how to integrate and receive automated notifications about ad statuses and other events through a webhook system using HTTP POST requests.

documents.title: Configuração de Notificações
documents.summary: This document explains how to set up and manage webhook notifications for advertisement status updates using the OLX self-service API. It covers authentication via OAuth and the CRUD operations required to manage notification endpoints and tokens.

documents.title: Modelo de notificações
documents.summary: This document defines the structure and data format of webhook notifications, including the specific JSON payload fields and requirements for receiving ad status updates.

documents.title: Notificação de Status de Anúncios
documents.summary: This document describes the structure and field definitions for advertisement status notifications, including a comprehensive list of possible status values and refusal reasons for integrators.

documents.title: Codificação de URL
documents.summary: This document outlines the required URL structures and formatting for configuring notification endpoints, specifically detailing how to include advertiser identifiers in paths or subdomains.

documents.title: Documentação para a Integração de Chat
documents.summary: This document provides an overview of the OLX chat integration, detailing how to authenticate via oAuth and handle the bidirectional exchange of messages between OLX and external CRM systems.

documents.title: Recebendo mensagens do chat (OLX → CRM)
documents.summary: This document explains how to configure and receive OLX chat messages via webhooks in a CRM, detailing the activation/deactivation endpoints and the chat message data structure.

documents.title: Respondendo à um chat (CRM → OLX)
documents.summary: This document provides the technical specification for the OLX Auto Service API endpoint used to send chat messages from a CRM system to the OLX platform.

documents.title: Documentação para a Integração de Leads com a OLX
documents.summary: This document provides an overview of how CRMs and management software can integrate with OLX to automatically receive lead data via API.

documents.title: Integrar lead na OLX
documents.summary: Explica como configurar e gerenciar endpoints para o recebimento de leads da OLX via API, incluindo autenticação oAuth e operações de CRUD para URLs de notificação.

documents.title: Envio de Leads
documents.summary: This document outlines the technical specifications for integrating OLX leads via HTTP POST requests, detailing the required JSON payload structure, parameters, and status code handling.

documents.title: Leads com informações detalhadas do anúncio
documents.summary: This document explains the integration of lead data with an additional 'adsInfo' structure that provides detailed advertisement metadata for automotive categories.

documents.title: Contato
documents.summary: This document explains the process for configuring lead delivery URLs and obtaining technical homologation for OLX integrators via API or support.

documents.title: Destaques do anuncio
documents.summary: This document explains the Destaques feature for boosting ad visibility on the OLX platform and provides links to API documentation for managing highlights and account balances.

documents.title: Consumo Saldos e Limites de Anúncios
documents.summary: This document explains how to use the OLX balance API to monitor ad insertion limits, available balances, and plan renewal dates for professional accounts.

documents.title: Consulta de anúncios destacados
documents.summary: This document provides technical specifications for the OLX API endpoint used to query the status and schedule of highlighted ads. It details the request parameters, authentication requirements, and the structure of both success and error responses.

documents.title: Aplicação de destaque em anúncio
documents.summary: This document provides technical specifications for the OLX Highlights API, detailing how to apply 'bumps' to advertisements to increase their visibility on the platform.

documents.title: Renovação de Anúncios
documents.summary: This document provides the technical specification for the OLX Ad Renewal API, explaining how to programmatically reactivate expired advertisements using batch processing via a PATCH request.

documents.title: Histórico Veicular
documents.summary: This document explains the Vehicle History (HV) report, outlining its benefits for buyers and sellers, the types of legal and administrative data included, and the methods for technical activation.

documents.title: Via Importação do Anúncio
documents.summary: This document explains how to activate the Vehicle History feature during the ad import process on OLX, detailing specific API parameters and mandatory field requirements.

documents.title: Via Administração do HV
documents.summary: This document provides technical documentation for the Vehicle History API, detailing how to activate, query, and remove vehicle history information from advertisements.

documents.title: JSON para Imóveis na OLX
documents.summary: This document outlines the requirements and category codes for importing real estate listings into the OLX platform via JSON, providing links to subcategory-specific parameters.

documents.title: Imóveis
documents.summary: This document outlines the requirements and category codes for importing real estate listings into OLX using the JSON format, including subcategory-specific parameters.

documents.title: Importação de Anúncios via Arquivo JSON
documents.summary: This document outlines the specific parameters, data types, and required values for creating or editing real estate listings in the Apartments subcategory.

documents.title: Importação de Anúncios via Arquivo JSON
documents.summary: This document defines the technical schema and parameter values required for submitting real estate listings under the Houses subcategory of an advertising platform.

documents.title: Importação de Anúncios via Arquivo JSON
documents.summary: This document outlines the specific parameters and configuration required for submitting advertisements under the Commerce and Industry subcategory within an API payload.

documents.title: Importação de Anúncios via Arquivo JSON
documents.summary: This document outlines the specific parameters and data formatting required for posting or editing listings in the land and farm real estate subcategory via API.

documents.title: Importação de Anúncios via Arquivo JSON
documents.summary: This document specifies the mandatory parameters and JSON structure required to create or edit listings in the room rental subcategory.

documents.title: Importação de Anúncios via Arquivo JSON
documents.summary: This document defines the technical parameters and allowed values for listing real estate advertisements in the vacation rentals subcategory. It provides a detailed field reference and a JSON payload example for system integration.

documents.title: Categoria de Imóveis

documents.title: Documentação para a Importação via XML para Imóveis na OLX
documents.summary: This document provides technical instructions for importing real estate advertisements to the OLX platform via XML files, detailing required tags, data formats, and structural parameters.

documents.title: Apartamentos
documents.summary: This document defines the technical parameters and data schema required for creating or editing real estate listings in the Apartments subcategory. It specifies mandatory and optional fields, valid values, and payload structures for property details like room count, area, and building features.

documents.summary: This document provides technical specifications and mapping rules for listing commercial and industrial properties via XML on the OLX platform.

documents.summary: This document outlines the API endpoints and request formats for retrieving lists of mobile phone brands and models available on the OLX platform.
